Free calculator · 60 seconds

Marketing team capacity calculator.

Compare three scenarios side by side: your current capacity, your AI-enabled capacity (same team), and your capacity after hiring one more person. Tells you which move actually adds output — and what it costs.

Count substantive output: blog posts, emails, ads, landing pages, social campaigns. Each counts as 1.

Salary + benefits + overhead. Typical mid-market: $90K-$140K

pieces per month

Onboarding time~90 days

AI is the clear win for this team

How the math works

What\'s behind the calculation

Current capacity uses your reported monthly output as baseline.

AI-enabled capacity applies a 2.5x multiplier (the typical lift from properly-implemented AI workflows: first-draft work compresses 4-5x while editorial work stays roughly the same, blending to ~2.5x overall output gain). AI cost assumes Claude Team ($30/seat × team size × 12 months) plus a one-time $3,500 implementation engagement.

Hire-one-more capacity applies a 1.15x output multiplier (a new mid-level hire produces about 15% of team output once ramped, accounting for coordination overhead and ramp time).

For the deeper version of why AI usually wins this comparison see how to scale marketing without hiring.
